entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no running dispatch and an empty in-flight batch.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no retention pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no cleanup pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no reservation-expiry pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no callback dispatch to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no pacing cycle to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no inbox batch to be claimed or running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one task and provider reconciliation re-evaluates durable state.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no reconciliation pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell performs immediate reconciliation and resolves exactly one scheduled task.

entries.quiesce: No requests are admitted in the idle fixture while the old shell is being replaced.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires zero admitted webhook requests.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell creates a new limiter with no rate-limit state from the prior activation.

entries.quiesce: The pre-disable coordinator invokes the Voice participant before the feature descriptor changes.
entries.drain: The idle participant completes immediately because no active voice work exists.
entries.reEnable: The new shell invokes provider-truth reconciliation during tenant activation.

entries.quiesce: The feature-owned hub route is absent after the tenant pipeline reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires zero connected agents or supervisors.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell maps one hub route and SignalR creates new connection state.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no reconciliation pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves one task and runs tenant activation reconciliation.

entries.quiesce: The feature-owned hub route is absent after the tenant pipeline reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires zero connected soft-phone clients.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell maps one hub route and creates new connection state.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no automated-activity batch to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Tenant termination cancels the listener and awaits its run task.
entries.drain: Idle listener shutdown completes after cancellation with no provider event in flight.
entries.reEnable: Tenant activation starts one fresh listener guarded against duplicate starts.

entries.quiesce: The scoped stateless adapter disappears from the rebuilt shell when the feature is disabled.
entries.drain: Idle contract has no provider command in flight.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves a new scoped adapter through the provider resolver.

entries.quiesce: The scoped media provider disappears from the rebuilt shell when the feature is disabled.
entries.drain: Idle contract has no media session open.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves a new scoped media provider.

entries.quiesce: The scoped stateless adapter disappears from the rebuilt shell when the feature is disabled.
entries.drain: Idle contract has no provider command in flight.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves a new scoped adapter through the provider resolver.
